name: accounting firms managing petty cash for 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing petty cash for 5–15 clients, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate weekly reconciliation and email summary reports instead of manual reconciliation and reporting.
target_audience: accounting firms managing petty cash for 5–15 clients
problem_solved: inefficient reconciliation of petty cash transactions

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient reconciliation of petty cash transactions
